intro.bio:
**Frontend** developer and bachelor in **Computer Science** (UFCG, 2024) with solid experience in **fintech**. My background as a **Product Designer** gives me a broad product perspective, acting as a strategic link between design and development for optimized implementations focused on **user experience**.
I led and developed interfaces for critical financial products, including the expansion of **International Pix**, **Core Banking** solutions, and the architecture and maintenance of the frontend of high-relevance systems such as **PagTesouro** for the Federal Government.
My technical expertise includes **React 18+**, **Next.js**, **React Native**, **Angular (6+)**, and **TypeScript**, with a focus on secure checkout flows, financial dashboards, and scalable interfaces. Day to day, I use **CI/CD** pipelines and testing with **Cypress** and **Jest** to ensure code quality and delivery agility in high-demand environments.

contact.title: Contact me
contact.caption: I'm open to job opportunities. If you'd like to get in touch, feel free to send me an email through the form below or via my social networks.

skills.title: Skills
skills.caption: Some of the languages and tools I'm familiar with and have been practicing throughout my years of experience and study.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

descriptions.pagtesouro: Architecture and maintenance of PagTesouro frontend for the Federal Government. High-relevance, secure interfaces.
descriptions.fintech: Interface development for Core Banking and International Pix expansion. Checkout flows and financial dashboards.
descriptions.designer: Product and UI design work, foundation for the transition to frontend development.
descriptions.blockfy: Technical leadership on PagTesouro frontend (Federal Government) with Angular; dashboards for Harpia AI; dynamic forms with React Hook Form and Zod for cross-border operations; component library with Tailwind; CI/CD and testing with Cypress and Jest.
descriptions.beeteller: Evolution of Pago Parcelado (Angular) and 3DS integration; International Pix sustainment (40k+ merchants); Beeteller ID (KYC/Onboarding); Payin/Payout integration with REST APIs and 40+ payment methods.
descriptions.educbank: Design System and Style Guide; interfaces for tuition guarantee and school cash flow; Figma component library; financial dashboards for 500+ schools.

details.blockfy:
Projects: PagTesouro (Federal Government), Harpia AI, Cross-border Operations.
• PagTesouro frontend with Angular: checkout flow for GRU payments via PIX and card.
• Analytical dashboards for Harpia AI with AI model integration.
• Dynamic forms with React Hook Form and Zod for cross-border operations.
• Component library with Tailwind; CI/CD pipelines; Cypress and Jest.
details.beeteller:
Projects: Pago Parcelado, International Pix, Beeteller ID (KYC), Payin, Payout, Core Banking.
• Pago Parcelado evolution (Angular) and 3DS checkout integration.
• International Pix sustainment with Angular/RxJS (40k+ merchants).
• Beeteller ID: KYC and Onboarding.
• Payin/Payout integration with REST APIs; 40+ payment methods.
details.educbank:
Project: Design System and financial ecosystem for schools.
• Design System and Style Guide; interfaces for tuition guarantee and cash flow.
• Figma component library; dashboards for 500+ schools.
